title: Jurassic World Craft [DLC Port]
description: Adds the Jurassic World Dinos and more to Minecraft
body:
![Jurassic World Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/122307078071e2498670b78fcc2f71b4b16fd852.png)
## New Update coming this December! (UPDATE: is delayed)

---

**Jurassic World Craft** is the ultimate mod for dinosaur enthusiasts and Minecraft adventurers, bringing the excitement of prehistoric life to your game. This mod faithfully incorporates the iconic dinosaurs from the **Jurassic World DLC** in **Minecraft Bedrock**, allowing you to experience the thrill of interacting with these ancient creatures in your own worlds.  

🦕 **Discover Fossils and Amber** in the Overworld, essential resources to revive and create your own dinosaurs. With a bit of exploration, you can bring the majestic creatures of the past back to life and populate your Minecraft world with an incredible prehistoric ecosystem.  

🌟 Over time, the mod will continue to grow, with regular updates planned to introduce even more species and features to enhance your Jurassic World experience.  

---

**Current Dinosaurs:** 
- Ankylosaurus (2 Skins) 🦖
- Brachiosaurus (2 Skins)
- Ceratosaurus (2 Skins)
- Compsognathus
- Dilophosaurus 
- Dimorphodon (2 Skins)
- Gallimimus 
- Mixosaurus (2 Skins)
- Parasaurolophus (2 Skins)
- Pteranodon (2 Skins)
- Spinosaurus (2 Skins)
- Stegosaurus (2 Skins) 
- Stygimoloch
- Triceratops (2 Skins)
- Tyrannosaurus Rex (3 Skins) 
- Velociraptor (4 Skins) 

Whether you're creating your very own dinosaur park or just want to roam the lands with these magnificent creatures, Jurassic World Craft delivers an immersive and nostalgic adventure.  

---

**Note:**  
_Not all the assets of the Jurassic World DLC are ported. This mod is mostly made out of original content except for most dinosaurs._  

Prepare for an unforgettable journey into the prehistoric age — download **Jurassic World Craft** today and bring the dinosaurs back to life!  

---
